codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses the three prior scrutiny failures: CacheManager now restores duplicate-name by-name mappings on remove/update, JsonRepository coverage now proves dedup indexes are cleaned after cascades, and the time-slot cascade persistence test now reloads facts, deductions, and rejections from disk.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The original cache-manager and json-repo-crud transcripts show the worker repeatedly struggling with unavailable Create/Edit-style tools before proceeding. The current refactor-worker skill does not warn about adapting when those tools are absent in this environment.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entries for b7676957-3427-49b5-9d1e-6f3abfe8bc25 and aaca7bb7-8dda-4940-b189-5e7854f85d57 contain many failed Create/Edit attempts; SKILL.md focuses on procedure but not tool-surface caveats.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The architecture note that Script.metadata.characters_mentioned stores character names rather than IDs is now present in .factory/library/architecture.md, which closes the knowledge gap identified in the earlier json-repo-cascade review.

summary: Pass. Commit 7f94cf1 resolves the earlier blocking scrutiny findings and adds targeted regression coverage without introducing new high-confidence bugs in the reviewed scope.
